PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-25-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Charles Jonas for and with Diane Churchill.

Mr. Jonas stated that Janis Mitchell neither revoked the will or lost it, and that it was left with a Friend. Ms. Churchill explained that a Friend of the Decedent who lives in Oakland came into the home and took a file and then forgot she had the will, and that the will was given to her yesterday. The Court directed Counsel to file the original will. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Leonardini. (Not Reported)
